suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document when to extract shared components to admin/_shared/. Currently, workers are defining local utility functions (asNullableText, isReservationInstance, stringifyJson, getStatusBadgeProps) and local UI primitives (SectionCard, FilterBar, ActionPanel) in each page file. These patterns appear across multiple redesigned admin pages. AGENTS.md should guide workers to extract truly shared patterns.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: admin-reportes-redesign review found local utility functions at lines 99-238. admin-auditoria-redesign has similar FilterBar. admin-configuracion-redesign has SectionCard. This duplication suggests a missing convention.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Define the approved pattern for spacing in Mantine Grid layouts. The use of rem() function for vertical alignment (e.g., mt={rem(28)}) is flagged as an anti-pattern. Proper Mantine Stack/Group gap spacing should be used instead. Document this in AGENTS.md under frontend conventions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: admin-reportes-redesign review noted 'rem(28) used for alignment' as anti-pattern at lines 1125, 1148.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider adding a shared BookingStatus type to the codebase. Status strings ('confirmed', 'held', 'pending', 'cancelled') are used as string literals throughout admin pages without a shared type. A BookingStatus type would improve type safety and discoverability.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: admin-reportes-redesign review noted 'No BookingStatus type defined. Status strings used as string literals throughout'.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the design token coverage gaps: error/warning/info color scales only go up to *-600 in design-tokens.css. Components referencing *-700 tokens will fall back to browser defaults. Also document the approved CSS approach (Tailwind alongside Mantine appears established but undocumented).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: admin-configuracion-redesign review found 'color="emerald"' used instead of teal palette. Previous milestone (dashboard-citas-usuarios) noted --error-700, --warning-700, --info-700 tokens missing.

rejectedObservations.observation: Tailwind CSS being used alongside Mantine should be documented as an accepted pattern
rejectedObservations.reason: This is already an established (if undocumented) pattern across the codebase. The suggestion to document it would belong in library/ rather than AGENTS.md as it's descriptive of existing practice, not normative guidance.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker used git commit with proper Conventional Commits format
rejectedObservations.reason: This is not a new observation - the worker followed existing conventions correctly. No action needed.
